Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class ReportGrouping

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ReportGrouping
public class ReportGrouping extends Object

Java class for ReportGrouping complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ReportGrouping">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="aggregateType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ReportAggrType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateGranularity" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}UserDateGranularity" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="field" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="sortByName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sortOrder" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}SortOrder"/>
         <element name="sortType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ReportSortType" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
